title: Authentication, Passwords, Sessions, Cookies, and JOSE · Type Recall
summary: A delayed operations handoff reconstructs authentication, passwords, sessions, cookies, and jose from bounded code and request evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the credential verification and principal-construction contract. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for credential verification and principal-construction contract after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Apply modern password hashing, salt, work policy, input bounds, constant-behavior comparison, breach and reset controls, rehash migration, and secret separation.
Generate opaque session identifiers, store server-side state, rotate at authentication and privilege changes, expire idle and absolute lifetime, revoke, and prevent fixation.
Use jose verification with explicit algorithms, trusted keys, issuer, audience, expiration, not-before, clock tolerance, token type, and bounded claim validation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Password Verifier Policy · changed case · Review Password Verifier Policy
steps.instruction:
review case — A review team handles case 6935 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to validate bounded token claims and session rotation before constructing a principal; preserve one tenant fairness invariant; then abort during a dependency phase and preserve cleanup plus response ownership. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Apply modern password hashing, salt, work policy, input bounds, constant-behavior comparison, breach and reset controls, rehash migration, and secret separation.

Which action demonstrates Password Verifier Policy without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Node and Express server Password Verifier Policy · changed case · Review Password Verifier Policy.
